recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: 25 km/h

recommendations.title: Beautiful Minds
recommendations.overview: Two men, with vastly different life stories and personalities, embark on a hearse heading to the South of France. During their journey they realize that, however unlikely, they're not so different in the end.

recommendations.title: Journey with Papa

recommendations.title: The Nameless
recommendations.overview: The mutilated body of a six year old girl is found in a water hole. The girl is identified as the missing daughter of Claudia. However, only two peices of evidence could be used to identify her; a bracelet with her name on it near the crime scene, an

recommendations.title: The Judge
recommendations.overview: A successful lawyer returns to his hometown for his mother's funeral only to discover that his estranged father, the town's judge, is suspected of murder.

recommendations.title: Baby Boy
recommendations.overview: The story of Jody, a misguided, 20-year-old African-American who is really just a baby boy finally forced-kicking and screaming to face the commitments of real life. Streetwise and jobless, he has not only fathered two children by two different women

recommendations.title: High Society
recommendations.overview: Two girls from very different social backgrounds discover, at the age of 25, that they had been switched at birth.

recommendations.title: Like Crazy
recommendations.overview: Two mental patients with opposite personalities ditch their Tuscan hospital and embark on an unpredictable exploration of the real world.

recommendations.title: How Viktor "The Garlic" Took Alexey "The Stud" to the Nursing Home
